Class StudentProfileService

java.lang.Object
app.service.StudentProfileService
public class StudentProfileService extends Object
Handles student-specific profile actions such as researcher mode, supervisor assignment, diploma project setup, ratings, and course teacher lookup.

    • setSupervisor

      public void setSupervisor(User actor, String supervisorLogin) throws LowHIndexException
      Assigns or clears a supervisor for a bachelor student.
      Parameters:
      actor - the student performing the action
      supervisorLogin - login of the supervisor to assign, or blank to clear
      Throws:
      LowHIndexException - if supervisor h-index is below the required threshold

    • setDiplomaProject

      public void setDiplomaProject(User actor, String title, String description)
      Creates or replaces a diploma project for a graduate student.
      Parameters:
      actor - the student performing the action
      title - diploma project title
      description - diploma project description

    • teachersForCourse

      public List<Teacher> teachersForCourse(User actor, String courseId)
